daily.topThemeTitle: Defending Human Learning — and Its Integrity
daily.topThemeBody: Integrity moves to center stage: a Brown professor suspects most of his class cheated with AI on a take-home exam, while Inside Higher Ed's Human Intelligence Labs, a campus "AI Kitchen," a Socratic revival, and an EdSurge podcast on teacher instinct all insist some learning must stay human.

themes.title: Defending Human Learning — and Its Integrity
From Data Collection to Data Use
